checks.finding: REQ-006 through REQ-017 define observable files, content, interfaces, diagnostics, inventories, compatibility, versioning, hash binding, and approval state; AC-001 through AC-016 provide validation surfaces.
Every goal REQ-006 through REQ-017 maps to at least one criterion and planned test.
Acceptance criteria specify inspectable artifacts, stable diagnostics and exit states, regression behavior, manifest hashes, rejection cases, and workflow states.

Non-goals and decisions explicitly exclude direct Figma integration, automated visualization, new review stages, backend layer files, LITE changes, implicit legacy feature validation, and unrelated gate changes.
Canonical anchor syntax, CLI interfaces, slug validation, exact inventory, compatibility, parity, version, hash binding, tamper rejection, and approval boundaries are explicit.
Each stated risk has a planned validation surface for review integrity, legacy compatibility, interview burden, and metadata drift.
